purpose: Wave 0 promoted proof that the count ledger can represent real app-renderable formula/rule entries without counting random presets.
counting_rule: Only formula/rule identities with counted_entry=true and ingest_status=promoted contribute to the 5k-10k objective.

entries.formula_or_rule: z0 = 0; z(n+1) = z(n)^2 + c; escape when |z| exceeds bailout

provenance.reuse_decision: formula identity is public mathematical definition; app renderer is local implementation

entries.license_context: formula identity only; no upstream source copied
entries.notes: Core escape-time formula; presets such as Seahorse Valley are not counted separately.

entries.formula_or_rule: z0 = pixel; z(n+1) = z(n)^2 + k for fixed complex parameter k; escape when |z| exceeds bailout

provenance.reuse_decision: formula identity is public mathematical definition; app renderer is local implementation

entries.license_context: formula identity only; no upstream source copied
entries.notes: Julia parameter presets are not counted separately unless promoted as named stable formula variants.

entries.formula_or_rule: z = (abs(real(z)), abs(imag(z))); z(n+1) = z^2 + c; escape when |z| exceeds bailout

provenance.reuse_decision: formula identity is public mathematical definition; app renderer is local implementation

entries.license_context: formula identity only; no upstream source copied
entries.notes: Escape-time folded-coordinate formula; camera/palette presets are not counted.

entries.formula_or_rule: z(n+1) = z(n)^2 + c + p*z(n-1); escape when |z| exceeds bailout

provenance.reuse_decision: formula identity is public mathematical definition; app renderer is local implementation

entries.license_context: formula identity only; no upstream source copied
entries.notes: Memory-term Julia-family formula; parameter presets are not counted.

entries.formula_or_rule: Newton iteration z(n+1) = z - (z^3 - 1)/(3*z^2); color by converged root basin

provenance.reuse_decision: formula identity is public mathematical definition; app renderer is local implementation

entries.license_context: formula identity only; no upstream source copied
entries.accessibility_label: Newton z cubed minus one root basin fractal
entries.notes: Counts the z^3-1 Newton method identity; individual root colors/palettes are not counted.
